name: Wellington International Airport Limited 4% SNR BDS 05/08/2024 NZD1000
summary: Wellington International Airport Limited 4% SNR BDS 05/08/2024 NZD1000 represents a specific bond issue by Wellington International Airport Limited, maturing on August 5, 2024, with a 4% interest rate and denominated in New Zealand Dollars. This bond is a senior debt obligation of the company. Wellington International Airport is located in Wellington, New Zealand.
